alerts.title: US conducts additional strikes on Iran missile and drone sites over Hormuz
alerts.summary: US military launched fresh airstrikes against Iranian missile and drone facilities in response to Iranian attack on commercial vessel in Persian Gulf. Multiple confirmed strikes reported by CENTCOM across Iranian positions near Strait of Hormuz (lat 31.98, lon 52.77). Threat level remains at 9/10 (CRITICAL). Oil prices fluctuating between $70-71. Sources: incidents (CENTCOM, NBC News, New York Times), global_metrics (threat level).

alerts.title: Gaza strikes kill at least 8 Palestinians including 2 children amid fragile ceasefire
alerts.summary: Israeli drone and artillery strikes in Gaza killed minimum 8 Palestinians, including 2 children and Al Jazeera cameraman, despite April ceasefire agreement. Multiple incidents reported across central and southern Gaza (lat 31.23-31.69, lon 34.21-34.73). Follows pattern of ceasefire violations documented in incidents feed. Sources: incidents (PBS, NBC News, Reuters, Al Jazeera, Religion News Service).

alerts.title: US reverses prior agreement, conditions Iranian asset freeze on nuclear progress
alerts.summary: US State Department announced unfreezing of Iranian assets is now contingent on nuclear file advancement, contradicting explicit prior accord that nuclear issues would not be negotiated in current phase. Iran rejected shift and threatened to halt talks. Enrichment remains at 60% U-235 with 1-2 week breakout window. Sources: telegram (ME Spectator, 54.1K views, nuclear flag), global_metrics (nuclear headlines, breakout timeline).

alerts.title: Houthis escalate Red Sea campaign; announce ban on Israeli vessels
alerts.summary: Houthis formally announced sweeping ban on Israeli shipping in Red Sea and confirmed multiple recent attacks on commercial traffic. Positions coordinated with Iranian proxy escalation in Persian Gulf. Four separate incident reports document Houthi naval threats and attacks. USS Eisenhower, USS Bataan, and destroyers USS Carney, Mason, Laboon deployed to Red Sea in response. Sources: incidents (Long War Journal, Reuters, Seatrade, Asharq Al-Awsat), assets (three destroyers Red Sea-positioned).

alerts.title: Drone targets US Embassy Baghdad Green Zone; Iraqi militias escalate
alerts.summary: Drone attack directed at US Embassy compound in Baghdad Green Zone with unclear impact. Militia personnel attempted interception with small arms fire. Reflects elevated Iraqi Shiite Militia activity status (elevated—base strikes detected per global_metrics). Part of broader proxy escalation tied to US-Iran trading strikes. Sources: telegram (ME Spectator, 51.4K views, drone flag), global_metrics (proxy status elevated).

analysis_note: US-Iran direct military exchange escalating across multiple domains (air, naval, proxy) while nuclear talks stalled over asset-freeze reversal; threat level critical; Israel-Gaza ceasefire visibly eroding; Houthis and Iraqi militias amplifying regional destabilization.
